name: Java Crunch Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except the coconut. Blend well with a mixer.
3. Stir in the coconut; mix thoroughly.
4. Drop rounded teaspoons of mixture onto ungreased cookie sheets.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 10 to 12 minutes.
6. Cool and enjoy. Makes 36 to 42 cookies.
